allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['ticker'], r['price'], r.get\('error',''\)\) for r in d['rows']]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ticker:', d['ticker']\); print\('price:', d['quote']['regularMarketPrice']\); print\('composite score:', d['compositeScore']\); print\('verdict:', d['verdict']\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count:', d['count']\); [print\(r['ticker'], r['price'], 'vol:', r['volume']\) for r in d['rows'][:5]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('fetched:', [\(x.get\('symbolToken'\), x.get\('tradingSymbol'\), x.get\('ltp'\)\) for x in d.get\('data',{}\).get\('fetched',[]\)]\); print\('unfetched:', d.get\('data',{}\).get\('unfetched',[]\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('status:', d['status']\); [print\(x['tradingsymbol'], x['symboltoken'], x.get\('name',''\)\) for x in \(d.get\('data'\) or []\)[:5]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['ticker'], r['changePct']\) for r in d['rows']]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); eq=[x for x in d['data'] if x['tradingsymbol'].endswith\('-EQ'\)]; print\('EQ stocks found:', len\(eq\)\); [print\(x['tradingsymbol'], x['symboltoken']\) for x in eq[:8]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('price:', d.get\('regularMarketPrice'\), 'chg%:', d.get\('regularMarketChangePercent'\), 'vol:', d.get\('regularMarketVolume'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('status:', d['status'], 'count:', len\(d.get\('data'\) or []\)\); [print\(x['tradingsymbol'], x['symboltoken']\) for x in \(d.get\('data'\) or []\)[:5]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(r['ticker'], r['name']\) for r in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")

Bash(python -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) t = d['technical'] print\('=== Technical Agent \(new rubric\) ==='\) print\(f'Raw score: {t[\\"rawScore\\"]}/100 \(grade: {t[\\"grade\\"]}\)'\) print\(f'Normalized: {t[\\"score\\"]}/10'\) print\(\) print\('Sub-scores:'\) for k, v in t['subScores'].items\(\): print\(f' {k:<20} {v[\\"score\\"]}/20 — {v[\\"assessment\\"][:60]}'\) print\(\) print\(f'Pattern: {t[\\"patternDetected\\"]}'\) print\(f'Direction: {t[\\"trendDirection\\"]}'\) print\(f'Key Levels: S1=Rs{t[\\"keyLevels\\"][\\"support1\\"]} R1=Rs{t[\\"keyLevels\\"][\\"resistance1\\"]}'\) print\(\) print\(f'Composite: {d[\\"compositeScore\\"]}/10 Verdict: {d[\\"verdict\\"][:30]}'\) ")
